2152	    @cute.jit
2153	    def mma(
2154	        self,
2155	        sQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2156	        sK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2157	        sQv: cute.Tensor,
2158	        sV: cute.Tensor,
2159	        sVt: cute.Tensor,
2160	        sP: cute.Tensor,
2161	        tStS: cute.Tensor,
2162	        tOtO0: cute.Tensor,
2163	        tOtO1: cute.Tensor,
2164	        tiled_mma_QK: cute.TiledMma,
2165	        tiled_mma_QvV: cute.TiledMma,
2166	        tiled_mma_PVt: cute.TiledMma,
2167	        pipeline_Q: Optional[pipeline.PipelineAsync],
2168	        pipeline_K: Optional[pipeline.PipelineAsync],
2169	        pipeline_Qv: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2170	        pipeline_V: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2171	        pipeline_S: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2172	        pipeline_P: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2173	        pipeline_O0: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2174	        pipeline_O1: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2175	        sO_empty_mbar_ptr: Optional[cute.Pointer],
2176	        is_leader_cta: Boolean,
2177	        topk_length_dynamic: Optional[Int32],
2178	        block_info: BlockInfo,
2179	        SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
2180	        tile_scheduler: TileSchedulerProtocol,
2181	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2182	    ):
2183	        # ==== mma warp ====
2184	        # Description: Computes Q @ K^T, Qv @ V^T, and P @ V
2185	        # Produces: S, O
2186	        # Consumes: Q, K, Qv, V, P
2187	
2188	        pipelines_O = [pipeline_O0, pipeline_O1]
2189	        tOtOs = [tOtO0, tOtO1]
2190	
2191	        use_ptx_gemm_QK = True
2192	        use_ptx_gemm_QvV = True
2193	        use_ptx_gemm_PVt = True
2194	
2195	        # Operands for S = Q @ K^T
2196	        if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2197	            tSrQ = tiled_mma_QK.make_fragment_A(sQ)
2198	            tSrK = tiled_mma_QK.make_fragment_B(sK)
2199	
2200	        # Operands for S += Qv @ V^T
2201	        tSrQv = tiled_mma_QvV.make_fragment_A(sQv)
2202	        tSrV = tiled_mma_QvV.make_fragment_B(sV)
2203	
2204	        # Operands for Oi = P @ Vi
2205	        tOrP = tiled_mma_PVt.make_fragment_A(sP)
2206	        tOrVt = tiled_mma_PVt.make_fragment_B(sVt)
2207	
2208	        # GEMM functions
2209	        if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2210	            if const_expr(use_ptx_gemm_QK):
2211	                gemm_QK = [
2212	                    partial(
2213	                        fa_sm100_utils.gemm_ptx_partial,
2214	                        tiled_mma_QK.op,
2215	                        self.tmem_offset_S[stage],
2216	                        zero_init=True,
2217	                        cta_group=self.cta_group_size,
2218	                    )
2219	                    for stage in range(self.num_stages_S)
2220	                ]
2221	            else:
2222	                gemm_QK = [
2223	                    partial(
2224	                        fa_sm100_utils.gemm,
2225	                        tiled_mma_QK,
2226	                        tStS[None, None, None, stage],
2227	                        zero_init=True,
2228	                    )
2229	                    for stage in range(self.num_stages_S)
2230	                ]
2231	        if const_expr(use_ptx_gemm_QvV):
2232	            gemm_QvV = [
2233	                partial(
2234	                    fa_sm100_utils.gemm_ptx_partial,
2235	                    tiled_mma_QvV.op,
2236	                    self.tmem_offset_S[stage],
2237	                    cta_group=self.cta_group_size,
2238	                )
2239	                for stage in range(self.num_stages_S)
2240	            ]
2241	        else:
2242	            gemm_QvV = [
2243	                partial(
2244	                    fa_sm100_utils.gemm,
2245	                    tiled_mma_QvV,
2246	                    tStS[None, None, None, stage],
2247	                )
2248	                for stage in range(self.num_stages_S)
2249	            ]
2250	
2251	        if const_expr(use_ptx_gemm_PVt):
2252	            gemm_PVt = [
2253	                partial(
2254	                    fa_sm100_utils.gemm_ptx_partial,
2255	                    tiled_mma_PVt.op,
2256	                    self.tmem_offsets_O[split],
2257	                    cta_group=self.cta_group_size,
2258	                )
2259	                for split in range(self.num_hdimv_splits)
2260	            ]
2261	        else:
2262	            gemm_PVt = [
2263	                partial(
2264	                    fa_sm100_utils.gemm,
2265	                    tiled_mma_PVt,
2266	                    tOtOs[split],
2267	                )
2268	                for split in range(self.num_hdimv_splits)
2269	            ]
2270	
2271	        Consumer, Producer = pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer
2272	        if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2273	            consumer_state_Q = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_Q)
2274	            consumer_state_K = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_K)
2275	        consumer_state_Qv = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_Qv)
2276	        consumer_state_V = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_V)
2277	        producer_state_S = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Producer, stages=self.num_stages_S)
2278	        consumer_state_P = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_P)
2279	        producer_state_O0 = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Producer, stages=self.num_stages_Oi)
2280	        producer_state_O1 = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Producer, stages=self.num_stages_Oi)
2281	
2282	        mma_fn = self.mma_inner
2283	        if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2284	            mma_QK = partial(
2285	                mma_fn, gemm_QK, pipeline_K, tSrQ, sQ, tSrK, sK, use_ptx=use_ptx_gemm_QK
2286	            )
2287	        mma_QvV = partial(
2288	            mma_fn, gemm_QvV, pipeline_V, tSrQv, sQv, tSrV, sV, use_ptx=use_ptx_gemm_QvV
2289	        )
2290	        mma_PVt = partial(
2291	            mma_fn, gemm_PVt, pipeline_V, tOrP, sP, tOrVt, sVt, use_ptx=use_ptx_gemm_PVt
2292	        )
2293	
2294	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
2295	        O_should_accumulate = False
2296	        while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
2297	            cluster_m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
2298	            if const_expr(self.use_packed_varlen_sched):
2299	                batch_idx = get_batch_from_cu_tensor(cluster_m_block, mCuSeqlensQ)
2300	                cluster_m_block -= mCuSeqlensQ[batch_idx]
2301	
2302	            seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
2303	            if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather):
2304	                n_block_min = 0
2305	                # n_block_max = self.topk_length // self.tile_n
2306	                n_block_max = topk_length_dynamic // self.tile_n
2307	            else:
2308	                n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
2309	                    seqlen,
2310	                    cluster_m_block,
2311	                )
2312	            num_n_blocks = n_block_max - n_block_min
2313	            even_n_blocks = num_n_blocks % 2 == 0 and num_n_blocks > 0
2314	            num_n_block_groups = cute.ceil_div(num_n_blocks, self.num_stages_S)
2315	
2316	            if is_leader_cta:
2317	                if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2318	                    pipeline_Q.consumer_wait(consumer_state_Q)
2319	
2320	                consumer_wait_state_Qv = consumer_state_Qv.clone()
2321	                for _ in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2322	                    pipeline_Qv.consumer_wait(consumer_wait_state_Qv)
2323	                    consumer_wait_state_Qv.advance()
2324	
2325	                producer_states_O = [producer_state_O0, producer_state_O1]
2326	
2327	                # ==== Prologue ====
2328	                pipeline_S.producer_acquire(producer_state_S)
2329	                if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2330	                    # S = Q @ K^T
2331	                    consumer_state_K = mma_QK(consumer_state_K, acc_stage=0)
2332	                # S += Qvi @ Vi^T
2333	                for split in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2334	                    consumer_state_V = mma_QvV(
2335	                        consumer_state_V,
2336	                        acc_stage=0,
2337	                        a_stage=split,
2338	                        zero_init=split == 0 and not self.has_qk,
2339	                    )
2340	                pipeline_S.producer_commit(producer_state_S)
2341	                producer_state_S.advance()
2342	
2343	                # ==== Mainloop ====
2344	                for _ in cutlass.range(num_n_block_groups - 1, unroll=1):
2345	                    for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_stages_S):
2346	                        next_stage = const_expr((stage + 1) % self.num_stages_S)
2347	                        pipeline_S.producer_acquire(producer_state_S)
2348	                        if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2349	                            # S = Q @ K^T
2350	                            consumer_state_K = mma_QK(consumer_state_K, acc_stage=next_stage)
2351	                        # S += Qvi @ Vi^T
2352	                        for split in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2353	                            consumer_state_V = mma_QvV(
2354	                                consumer_state_V,
2355	                                acc_stage=next_stage,
2356	                                a_stage=split,
2357	                                zero_init=split == 0 and not self.has_qk,
2358	                            )
2359	                        pipeline_S.producer_commit(producer_state_S)
2360	                        producer_state_S.advance()
2361	                        # Oi += P @ Vi
2362	                        pipeline_P.consumer_wait(consumer_state_P)
2363	                        for split in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2364	                            producer_state_Oi = producer_states_O[split]
2365	                            pipelines_O[split].producer_acquire(producer_state_Oi)
2366	                            consumer_state_V = mma_PVt(
2367	                                consumer_state_V,
2368	                                acc_stage=split,
2369	                                a_stage=consumer_state_P.index,
2370	                                zero_init=not O_should_accumulate,
2371	                            )
2372	                            pipelines_O[split].producer_commit(producer_state_Oi)
2373	                            producer_state_Oi.advance()
2374	                            producer_states_O[split] = producer_state_Oi
2375	                        pipeline_P.consumer_release(consumer_state_P)
2376	                        consumer_state_P.advance()
2377	                        O_should_accumulate = True
2378	
2379	                # ==== Epilogue ====
2380	                num_final_n_blocks = self.num_stages_S if even_n_blocks else self.num_stages_S - 1
2381	                for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_stages_S):
2382	                    n_block = num_final_n_blocks - 1 - stage
2383	                    if const_expr(stage == 0):
2384	                        if n_block > 0:
2385	                            pipeline_S.producer_acquire(producer_state_S)
2386	                            if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2387	                                # S = Q @ K^T
2388	                                consumer_state_K = mma_QK(consumer_state_K, acc_stage=stage + 1)
2389	                            # S += Qvi @ Vi^T
2390	                            for split in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2391	                                consumer_state_V = mma_QvV(
2392	                                    consumer_state_V,
2393	                                    acc_stage=stage + 1,
2394	                                    a_stage=split,
2395	                                    zero_init=split == 0 and not self.has_qk,
2396	                                )
2397	                            pipeline_S.producer_commit(producer_state_S)
2398	                            producer_state_S.advance()
2399	                    if n_block >= 0:
2400	                        # Oi += P @ Vi
2401	                        pipeline_P.consumer_wait(consumer_state_P)
2402	                        for split in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2403	                            producer_state_Oi = producer_states_O[split]
2404	                            pipelines_O[split].producer_acquire(producer_state_Oi)
2405	                            consumer_state_V = mma_PVt(
2406	                                consumer_state_V,
2407	                                acc_stage=split,
2408	                                a_stage=consumer_state_P.index,
2409	                                zero_init=not O_should_accumulate,
2410	                            )
2411	                            pipelines_O[split].producer_commit(producer_state_Oi)
2412	                            producer_state_Oi.advance()
2413	                            producer_states_O[split] = producer_state_Oi
2414	                        pipeline_P.consumer_release(consumer_state_P)
2415	                        consumer_state_P.advance()
2416	                    O_should_accumulate = True
2417	
2418	                producer_state_O0, producer_state_O1 = producer_states_O
2419	
2420	                if const_expr(self.has_qk):
2421	                    pipeline_Q.consumer_release(consumer_state_Q)
2422	                    consumer_state_Q.advance()
2423	
2424	                # if we overlap sOi with sQvi for tma store, need to acquire signal
2425	                if const_expr(self.use_tma_O and not self.overlap_sO_sV):
2426	                    pipeline_O0.producer_tail(producer_state_O0.clone())
2427	                    pipeline_O1.producer_tail(producer_state_O1.clone())
2428	
2429	                for _ in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2430	                    pipeline_Qv.consumer_release(consumer_state_Qv)
2431	                    consumer_state_Qv.advance()
2432	
2433	            # Advance to next tile
2434	            work_tile = tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
2435	            O_should_accumulate = False
2436	
2437	        pipeline_S.producer_tail(producer_state_S)
2438	        pipeline_O0.producer_tail(producer_state_O0)
2439	        pipeline_O1.producer_tail(producer_state_O1)
2440	
2441	    @cute.jit
2442	    def mma_inner(
2443	        self,
2444	        gemm,
2445	        load_pipeline,
2446	        tCrA,
2447	        sA,
2448	        tCrB,
2449	        sB,
2450	        consumer_state: pipeline.PipelineState,
2451	        acc_stage: Optional[Int32] = None,
2452	        a_stage: Int32 = 0,
2453	        zero_init: Optional[bool] = None,
2454	        use_ptx: bool = True,
2455	    ):
2456	        if const_expr(acc_stage is not None):
2457	            gemm = gemm[acc_stage]
2458	
2459	        tCrA_cur = tCrA[None, None, None, a_stage]
2460	        sA_cur = sA[None, None, None, a_stage]
2461	        b_stage = consumer_state.index
2462	        tCrB_cur = tCrB[None, None, None, b_stage]
2463	        sB_cur = sB[None, None, None, b_stage]
2464	
2465	        load_pipeline.consumer_wait(consumer_state)
2466	
2467	        kwargs = dict(tCrA=tCrA_cur, tCrB=tCrB_cur)
2468	        if const_expr(use_ptx):
2469	            kwargs |= dict(sA=sA_cur, sB=sB_cur)
2470	        if const_expr(zero_init is not None):
2471	            kwargs["zero_init"] = zero_init
2472	        gemm(**kwargs)
2473	
2474	        load_pipeline.consumer_release(consumer_state)
2475	        consumer_state.advance()
2476	        return consumer_state
2477	
2478	    @cute.jit
2479	    def softmax_loop(
2480	        self,
2481	        softmax_scale: Float32,
2482	        softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
2483	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2484	        mRowMax: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2485	        sRowMax: cute.Tensor,
2486	        sRowSum: cute.Tensor,
2487	        sScale: cute.Tensor,
2488	        sBitmask: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2489	        sP: cute.Tensor,
2490	        tStS: cute.Tensor,
2491	        thr_mma_S: cute.ThrMma,
2492	        pipeline_S: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2493	        pipeline_P: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2494	        pipeline_sm_stats: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2495	        pipeline_bitmask: Optional[pipeline.PipelineAsync],
2496	        sO_empty_mbar_ptr: Optional[cute.Pointer],
2497	        AttentionMaskCls: Callable,
2498	        topk_length_dynamic: Optional[Int32],
2499	        block_info: BlockInfo,
2500	        SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
2501	        tile_scheduler: TileSchedulerProtocol,
2502	        tma_atom_P: Optional[cute.CopyAtom] = None,
2503	        mP: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2504	        sP_out: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2505	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2506	    ):
2507	        # ==== softmax warpgroup ====
2508	        # Description: computes softmax on S and writes the result to P
2509	        # Produces: P, softmax stats
2510	        # Consumes: S, bitmask (for topk sparsity)
2511	
2512	        tidx = cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % self.num_softmax_threads
2513	        warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % (
2514	            self.num_softmax_threads // 32
2515	        )
2516	        cta_rank_in_cluster = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.block_idx_in_cluster())
2517	
2518	        tSAcc = tStS[(None, None), 0, 0, 0]
2519	        tSAcc_staged = [tStS[(None, None), 0, 0, stage] for stage in range(self.num_stages_S)]
2520	
2521	        cS = cute.make_identity_tensor(self.mma_tiler_QK[:2])  # (128, 128)
2522	        tScS = thr_mma_S.partition_C(cS)[(None, None), 0, 0]  # (64, 128)
2523	
2524	        # S tmem -> rmem copy objects
2525	        tmem_load_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
2526	            tcgen05.copy.Ld32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(32)),
2527	            self.dtype_acc,
2528	        )
2529	        tmem_load_tiled = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(tmem_load_atom, tSAcc)
2530	        tmem_load_thr = tmem_load_tiled.get_slice(tidx)
2531	        # S tmem -> rmem copy operands
2532	        tStS_t2r = tmem_load_thr.partition_S(tSAcc)  # (((32, 32), 1), 1, 2)
2533	        tStS_t2r_staged = [
2534	            tmem_load_thr.partition_S(tSAcc_staged[stage]) for stage in range(self.num_stages_S)
2535	        ]
2536	        tScS_t2r = tmem_load_thr.partition_D(tScS)
2537	        tSrS_t2r = cute.make_rmem_tensor(tScS_t2r.shape, self.dtype_acc)
2538	
2539	        # P rmem -> smem copy objects
2540	        universal_copy_bits = 128
2541	        smem_store_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
2542	            cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(),
2543	            self.dtype_P,
2544	            num_bits_per_copy=universal_copy_bits,
2545	        )
2546	        smem_store_tiled = cute.make_tiled_copy_D(smem_store_atom, tmem_load_tiled)
2547	        smem_store_thr = smem_store_tiled.get_slice(tidx)
2548	        # P rmem -> smem copy operands
2549	        sP_mnp_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
2550	            self.tile_P + (self.num_stages_P,), order=(0, 1, 2)
2551	        )
2552	        sP_mnp = cute.composition(sP, sP_mnp_layout)
2553	        sP_smem_view = smem_store_thr.partition_D(sP_mnp)
2554	
2555	        Consumer, Producer = pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer
2556	        consumer_state_S = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_S)
2557	        producer_state_P = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Producer, stages=self.num_stages_P)
2558	        producer_state_sm_stats = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Producer, stages=self.num_stages_sm_stats)
2559	        consumer_state_bitmask = None
2560	        if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather and not self.disable_bitmask):
2561	            consumer_state_bitmask = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
2562	                Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_bitmask
2563	            )
2564	
2565	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
2566	        while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
2567	            cluster_m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
2568	            if const_expr(self.use_packed_varlen_sched):
2569	                batch_idx = get_batch_from_cu_tensor(cluster_m_block, mCuSeqlensQ)
2570	                cluster_m_block -= mCuSeqlensQ[batch_idx]
2571	            cta_m_block = cluster_m_block * self.cta_group_size + cta_rank_in_cluster
2572	            seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
2573	            if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather):
2574	                n_block_min = 0
2575	                n_block_max = self.topk_length // self.tile_n
2576	                # n_block_max = topk_length_dynamic // self.tile_n
2577	            else:
2578	                n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
2579	                    seqlen,
2580	                    cluster_m_block,
2581	                )
2582	            num_n_blocks = n_block_max - n_block_min
2583	            even_n_blocks = num_n_blocks % 2 == 0 and num_n_blocks > 0
2584	            num_n_block_groups = cute.ceil_div(num_n_blocks, self.num_stages_S)
2585	
2586	            gRowMax = None
2587	            if const_expr(mRowMax is not None):
2588	                # (seqlen_q, {seqlen_k_rounded, topk} / tile_n)
2589	                if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q):
2590	                    mRowMax_cur = mRowMax[None, None, head_idx, batch_idx]
2591	                else:
2592	                    q_offset = (
2593	                        seqlen.offset_q if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa) else (0, seqlen.offset_q)
2594	                    )
2595	                    mRowMax_cur = cute.domain_offset((q_offset, 0), mRowMax[None, None, head_idx])
2596	                # (cta_tile_m, {seqlen_k_rounded, topk} / tile_n)
2597	                gRowMax = cute.local_tile(mRowMax_cur, (self.cta_tile_m,), (cta_m_block, None))
2598	
2599	            store_P = None
2600	            if const_expr(self.store_P):
2601	                # (seqlen_q, seqlen_k)
2602	                mP_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mP, batch_idx, dim=3, ragged=self.ragged_tma_O)[
2603	                    None, None, head_idx
2604	                ]
2605	                # (cta_tile_m, tile_n, num_n_blocks)
2606	                gP = cute.local_tile(mP_cur, self.tile_P, (cta_m_block, None))
2607	                store_P, tPsP, tPgP = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
2608	                    tma_atom_P,
2609	                    0,
2610	                    cute.make_layout(1),
2611	                    sP_out,
2612	                    gP,
2613	                )
2614	
2615	            mask = AttentionMaskCls(seqlen)
2616	            mask_fn = partial(
2617	                mask.apply_mask_sm100,
2618	                m_block=cluster_m_block,
2619	                thr_mma=thr_mma_S,
2620	                thr_tmem_load=tmem_load_thr,
2621	                mask_causal=self.is_causal,
2622	                mask_local=self.is_local,
2623	                batch_idx=batch_idx,
2624	                head_idx=head_idx,
2625	                r2p=False,  # TODO: fix r2p for 2cta
2626	            )
2627	            disable_mask = self.disable_bitmask and self.is_topk_gather
2628	
2629	            softmax = SoftmaxSm100.create(
2630	                softmax_scale_log2,
2631	                rescale_threshold=8.0 if const_expr(self.dtype_Q.width == 16) else 0.0,
2632	                softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
2633	            )
2634	            softmax.reset()
2635	
2636	            softmax_step_fn = partial(
2637	                self.softmax_step,
2638	                softmax,
2639	                sRowMax,
2640	                sScale,
2641	                sBitmask,
2642	                tStS_t2r_staged,
2643	                tSrS_t2r,
2644	                sP_smem_view,
2645	                tmem_load_thr,
2646	                smem_store_thr,
2647	                pipeline_S,
2648	                pipeline_P,
2649	                pipeline_sm_stats,
2650	                pipeline_bitmask,
2651	                tidx,
2652	                warp_idx,
2653	                store_P=store_P,
2654	                gRowMax=gRowMax,
2655	            )
2656	
2657	            ### first iteration ###
2658	            n_block = n_block_max - 1
2659	            (
2660	                consumer_state_S,
2661	                producer_state_P,
2662	                producer_state_sm_stats,
2663	                consumer_state_bitmask,
2664	            ) = softmax_step_fn(
2665	                consumer_state_S,
2666	                producer_state_P,
2667	                producer_state_sm_stats,
2668	                consumer_state_bitmask,
2669	                0,
2670	                n_block,
2671	                mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=True)
2672	                if not const_expr(disable_mask)
2673	                else None,
2674	                is_first=True,
2675	            )
2676	            n_block -= 1
2677	
2678	            ### Separate iterations with causal masking
2679	            # note: For square mma tile, can mask at most 1 n_block_group
2680	            if const_expr((self.is_causal or self.is_local) and not self.is_topk_gather):
2681	                n_block_min_causal_local_mask = block_info.get_n_block_min_causal_local_mask(
2682	                    seqlen, cluster_m_block, n_block_min
2683	                )
2684	                num_masked_n_blocks = n_block_max - 1 - n_block_min_causal_local_mask
2685	                num_masked_n_block_groups = min(
2686	                    num_n_block_groups - 1, cute.ceil_div(num_masked_n_blocks, self.num_stages_S)
2687	                )
2688	                num_n_block_groups -= num_masked_n_block_groups
2689	                for _ in cutlass.range(num_masked_n_block_groups, unroll=1):
2690	                    for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_stages_S):
2691	                        (
2692	                            consumer_state_S,
2693	                            producer_state_P,
2694	                            producer_state_sm_stats,
2695	                            consumer_state_bitmask,
2696	                        ) = softmax_step_fn(
2697	                            consumer_state_S,
2698	                            producer_state_P,
2699	                            producer_state_sm_stats,
2700	                            consumer_state_bitmask,
2701	                            1 - stage,
2702	                            n_block,
2703	                            mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=False),
2704	                        )
2705	                        n_block -= 1
2706	
2707	            ### Mainloop ###
2708	            for n_block_group in cutlass.range(num_n_block_groups - 1, unroll=1):
2709	                for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_stages_S):
2710	                    (
2711	                        consumer_state_S,
2712	                        producer_state_P,
2713	                        producer_state_sm_stats,
2714	                        consumer_state_bitmask,
2715	                    ) = softmax_step_fn(
2716	                        consumer_state_S,
2717	                        producer_state_P,
2718	                        producer_state_sm_stats,
2719	                        consumer_state_bitmask,
2720	                        1 - stage,
2721	                        n_block,
2722	                        mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=False)
2723	                        if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather and not self.disable_bitmask)
2724	                        else None,
2725	                    )
2726	                    n_block -= 1
2727	
2728	            ### last iteration if even ###
2729	            # always mask to simplify logic
2730	            if even_n_blocks:
2731	                (
2732	                    consumer_state_S,
2733	                    producer_state_P,
2734	                    producer_state_sm_stats,
2735	                    consumer_state_bitmask,
2736	                ) = softmax_step_fn(
2737	                    consumer_state_S,
2738	                    producer_state_P,
2739	                    producer_state_sm_stats,
2740	                    consumer_state_bitmask,
2741	                    1,
2742	                    n_block,
2743	                    mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=False)
2744	                    if not const_expr(disable_mask)
2745	                    else None,
2746	                )
2747	                n_block -= 1
2748	
2749	            # write row max and sum to smem
2750	            sRowSum[tidx % self.cta_tile_m, warp_idx // self.cta_group_size] = softmax.row_sum[0]
2751	            if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
2752	                if tidx < self.cta_tile_m:
2753	                    sRowMax[tidx, 0] = softmax.row_max[0]
2754	            self.sm_stats_barrier_full.arrive()
2755	
2756	            # Advance to next tile
2757	            work_tile = tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
2758	            self.sm_stats_barrier_empty.arrive_and_wait()
2759	
2760	        pipeline_P.producer_tail(producer_state_P)
2761	        pipeline_sm_stats.producer_tail(producer_state_sm_stats)
2762	
2763	    @cute.jit
2764	    def softmax_step(
2765	        self,
2766	        softmax: SoftmaxSm100,
2767	        sRowMax: cute.Tensor,
2768	        sScale: cute.Tensor,
2769	        sBitmask: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2770	        tStS_t2r_staged: cute.Tensor,
2771	        tSrS_t2r: cute.Tensor,
2772	        sP_smem_view: cute.Tensor,
2773	        tmem_load_thr: cute.CopyAtom,
2774	        smem_store_thr: cute.CopyAtom,
2775	        pipeline_S: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2776	        pipeline_P: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2777	        pipeline_sm_stats: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2778	        pipeline_bitmask: Optional[pipeline.PipelineAsync],
2779	        tidx: Int32,
2780	        warp_idx: Int32,
2781	        consumer_state_S: pipeline.PipelineState,
2782	        producer_state_P: pipeline.PipelineState,
2783	        producer_state_sm_stats: pipeline.PipelineState,
2784	        consumer_state_bitmask: Optional[pipeline.PipelineState],
2785	        stage: cutlass.Constexpr[Int32],
2786	        n_block: Int32,
2787	        mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
2788	        is_first: Boolean = False,
2789	        store_P: Optional[Callable] = None,
2790	        gRowMax: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2791	    ):
2792	        leader_warp = warp_idx == 0
2793	        tSrP = cute.make_rmem_tensor(tSrS_t2r.shape, self.dtype_P)
2794	        rP_smem_view = smem_store_thr.retile(tSrP)
2795	
2796	        pipeline_S.consumer_wait(consumer_state_S)
2797	        cute.copy(tmem_load_thr, tStS_t2r_staged[stage], tSrS_t2r)
2798	        cute.arch.fence_view_async_tmem_load()
2799	        pipeline_S.consumer_release(consumer_state_S)
2800	
2801	        rBitmask = None
2802	        if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather and not self.disable_bitmask):
2803	            assert pipeline_bitmask is not None
2804	            assert consumer_state_bitmask is not None
2805	            pipeline_bitmask.consumer_wait(consumer_state_bitmask)
2806	            rBitmask = cute.make_rmem_tensor((self.tile_n // 64,), dtype=Uint32)
2807	            bitmask_col_offset = self.tile_n // 64 if warp_idx >= 2 else 0
2808	            for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(rBitmask)):
2809	                rBitmask[i] = sBitmask[bitmask_col_offset + i, consumer_state_bitmask.index]
2810	
2811	        if const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
2812	            mask_fn(tSrS_t2r, n_block=n_block, rBitmask=rBitmask)
2813	
2814	        # compute threadwise row_max
2815	        row_max = softmax.compute_row_max_local(tSrS_t2r.load(), is_first)
2816	        # 2-thread reduce row_max through smem
2817	        assert self.cta_tile_m * self.cta_group_size == 128
2818	        sRowMax[tidx % self.cta_tile_m, warp_idx // self.cta_group_size] = row_max
2819	        self.softmax_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
2820	        # must release after barrier sync
2821	        if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather and not self.disable_bitmask):
2822	            pipeline_bitmask.consumer_release(consumer_state_bitmask)
2823	        row_max0 = sRowMax[tidx % self.cta_tile_m, 0]
2824	        row_max1 = sRowMax[tidx % self.cta_tile_m, 1]
2825	        row_max = max(row_max0, row_max1)
2826	
2827	        row_max, acc_scale = softmax.update_row_max_from_local(row_max, is_first)
2828	
2829	        if const_expr(gRowMax is not None):
2830	            if tidx < self.cta_tile_m:
2831	                gRowMax[tidx, n_block] = row_max
2832	
2833	        # note: acc_scales agree for paired threads
2834	        pipeline_sm_stats.producer_acquire(producer_state_sm_stats)
2835	        if warp_idx < self.cta_group_size:
2836	            sScale[tidx % self.cta_tile_m, producer_state_sm_stats.index] = acc_scale
2837	        pipeline_sm_stats.producer_commit(producer_state_sm_stats)
2838	
2839	        # x -> scale_log2*x-rowmax
2840	        softmax.scale_subtract_rowmax(tSrS_t2r, row_max)
2841	
2842	        # x -> exp2(x)
2843	        softmax.apply_exp2_convert(tSrS_t2r, tSrP)
2844	
2845	        if const_expr(self.store_P):
2846	            if leader_warp:
2847	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(self.num_stages_P - 1, read=True)
2848	            self.softmax_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
2849	
2850	        pipeline_P.producer_acquire(producer_state_P)
2851	        cute.copy(
2852	            smem_store_thr, rP_smem_view, sP_smem_view[None, None, None, producer_state_P.index]
2853	        )
2854	        cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
2855	        pipeline_P.producer_commit(producer_state_P)
2856	        # unconditionally necessary for sRowMax read to complete before next iter's store
2857	        self.softmax_barrier.arrive_and_wait()
2858	
2859	        if const_expr(self.store_P):
2860	            if leader_warp:
2861	                store_P(src_idx=producer_state_P.index, dst_idx=n_block)
2862	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
2863	
2864	        consumer_state_S.advance()
2865	        producer_state_P.advance()
2866	        producer_state_sm_stats.advance()
2867	        if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather and not self.disable_bitmask):
2868	            consumer_state_bitmask.advance()
2869	
2870	        softmax.update_row_sum(tSrS_t2r.load(), acc_scale, is_first)
2871	
2872	        return consumer_state_S, producer_state_P, producer_state_sm_stats, consumer_state_bitmask
2873	
2874	    @cute.jit
2875	    def correction_loop(
2876	        self,
2877	        softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
2878	        mO: cute.Tensor,
2879	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
2880	        tma_atom_O: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
2881	        sRowMax: cute.Tensor,
2882	        sRowSum: cute.Tensor,
2883	        sScale: cute.Tensor,
2884	        sO: cute.Tensor,
2885	        tOtO0: cute.Tensor,
2886	        tOtO1: cute.Tensor,
2887	        pipeline_O0: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2888	        pipeline_O1: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2889	        pipeline_sm_stats: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
2890	        sO_empty_mbar_ptr: Optional[cute.Pointer],
2891	        tiled_copy_O_r2g: cute.TiledCopy,
2892	        topk_length_dynamic: Optional[Int32],
2893	        block_info: BlockInfo,
2894	        SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
2895	        tile_scheduler: TileSchedulerProtocol,
2896	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
2897	    ):
2898	        ### ==== correction/epilogue warpgroup ====
2899	        # Correction: copy scale smem -> rmem, copy O tmem -> rmem, rescale O, store O rmem -> tmem
2900	        # Epilogue:   copy O tmem -> rmem, do final scaling of O, store O rmem -> gmem,
2901	        #             optionally store LSE
2902	        # Produces: -
2903	        # Consumes: O, softmax stats
2904	
2905	        tidx = cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] % self.num_epilogue_threads
2906	        warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % (
2907	            self.num_epilogue_threads // 32
2908	        )
2909	        cta_rank_in_cluster = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.block_idx_in_cluster())
2910	        leader_warp = warp_idx == 0
2911	
2912	        tOtO0 = tOtO0[(None, None), 0, 0]  # (64, (128, 2))
2913	        tOtO1 = tOtO1[(None, None), 0, 0]  # (64, (128, 2))
2914	        tOtOs = [tOtO0, tOtO1]
2915	
2916	        # tuneable parameter
2917	        corr_tile_size = math.gcd(32, self.tmem_cols_Oi)
2918	
2919	        tmem_load_atom_O = cute.make_copy_atom(
2920	            tcgen05.copy.Ld32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(corr_tile_size)),
2921	            self.dtype_acc,
2922	        )
2923	        tmem_store_atom_O = cute.make_copy_atom(
2924	            tcgen05.copy.St32x32bOp(tcgen05.copy.Repetition(corr_tile_size)),
2925	            self.dtype_acc,
2926	        )
2927	        thr_tmem_load_O = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(tmem_load_atom_O, tOtO0).get_slice(tidx)
2928	        thr_tmem_store_O = tcgen05.make_tmem_copy(tmem_store_atom_O, tOtO0).get_slice(tidx)
2929	
2930	        # ((32,1),1,4)
2931	        tOtOs_t2r = [
2932	            thr_tmem_load_O.partition_S(tOtOs[split]) for split in range(self.num_hdimv_splits)
2933	        ]
2934	        tOtOs_r2t = [
2935	            thr_tmem_store_O.partition_D(tOtOs[split]) for split in range(self.num_hdimv_splits)
2936	        ]
2937	
2938	        cOi = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.cta_tile_m, self.hdimv // self.num_hdimv_splits))
2939	        thr_tiled_copy_O_r2g = tiled_copy_O_r2g.get_slice(tidx)
2940	        tOicOi = thr_tiled_copy_O_r2g.partition_S(cOi)
2941	
2942	        tOicOi_t2r = thr_tmem_load_O.partition_D(tOicOi[(None, None), 0, 0])
2943	
2944	        pipelines_O = [pipeline_O0, pipeline_O1]
2945	
2946	        Consumer = pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer
2947	        consumer_state_O0 = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_Oi)
2948	        consumer_state_O1 = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_Oi)
2949	        consumer_state_sm_stats = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(Consumer, stages=self.num_stages_sm_stats)
2950	
2951	        do_correction_rescale = partial(
2952	            self.correction_rescale,
2953	            thr_tmem_load_O,
2954	            thr_tmem_store_O,
2955	            tOicOi_t2r,
2956	        )
2957	
2958	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
2959	        while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
2960	            cluster_m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
2961	            if const_expr(self.use_packed_varlen_sched):
2962	                batch_idx = get_batch_from_cu_tensor(cluster_m_block, mCuSeqlensQ)
2963	                cluster_m_block -= mCuSeqlensQ[batch_idx]
2964	            cta_m_block = cluster_m_block * self.cta_group_size + cta_rank_in_cluster
2965	
2966	            seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
2967	            if const_expr(self.is_topk_gather):
2968	                n_block_min = 0
2969	                n_block_max = self.topk_length // self.tile_n
2970	                # n_block_max = topk_length_dynamic // self.tile_n
2971	            else:
2972	                n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
2973	                    seqlen,
2974	                    cluster_m_block,
2975	                )
2976	            num_n_blocks = n_block_max - n_block_min
2977	
2978	            consumer_states_O = [consumer_state_O0, consumer_state_O1]
2979	
2980	            # acquire first signal and release immediately
2981	            pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_wait(consumer_state_sm_stats)
2982	            pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_release(consumer_state_sm_stats)
2983	            consumer_state_sm_stats.advance()
2984	
2985	            for _ in cutlass.range(num_n_blocks - 1, unroll=1):
2986	                pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_wait(consumer_state_sm_stats)
2987	                scale = sScale[tidx % self.cta_tile_m, consumer_state_sm_stats.index]
2988	                should_rescale = cute.arch.vote_ballot_sync(scale < 1.0) != 0
2989	                pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_release(consumer_state_sm_stats)
2990	                consumer_state_sm_stats.advance()
2991	
2992	                for split in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_hdimv_splits):
2993	                    consumer_state_Oi = consumer_states_O[split]
2994	                    pipelines_O[split].consumer_wait(consumer_state_Oi)
2995	                    if should_rescale:
2996	                        do_correction_rescale(
2997	                            tOtOs_t2r[split],
2998	                            tOtOs_r2t[split],
2999	                            scale,
3000	                        )
3001	                    pipelines_O[split].consumer_release(consumer_state_Oi)
3002	                    consumer_state_Oi.advance()
3003	                    consumer_states_O[split] = consumer_state_Oi
3004	
3005	            # (seqlen_q, hdimv)
3006	            mO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mO, batch_idx, dim=3, ragged=self.ragged_tma_O)[
3007	                None, None, head_idx
3008	            ]
3009	            # (cta_tile_m, hdimv//2, 2)
3010	            gO = cute.local_tile(
3011	                mO_cur,
3012	                (self.cta_tile_m, self.hdimv // self.num_hdimv_splits),
3013	                (cta_m_block, None),

3020	            ]

3046

3058	            )
3059

3142	        thr_tmem_store: cute.CopyAtom,
